content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix("auth_mw:expMs<nowMs=>401;allow:skew30")
C: "<=>401" ∧ skew30only ∧ boundary ∧ min_fix
H: "edge(-30s)_misclass"
P: reg_t:edge(-30s) → "patch:expMs<nowMs-skew30=>401"
V: "edge(-30s)_200" ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: ! reg_t ∧ ! loop
A: fix

[AUDIT]
Fix "auth mw:expMs<nowMs=>401;allow:skew30", preserve "<=>401", skew30only, and add a regression test for the 30-second grace window with "edge(-30s) 200".
